message:
bd-6tj5: Expand CLI + Config unit tests

Add 12 new unit tests for comprehensive CLI coverage:
- default_config_has_expected_values: verify Config::with_defaults()
- quick_flag_parses, force_terminal_flag_parses: simple flag tests
- short_help_flag_works: ensure -h works like --help
- all_color_system_variants_parse: test all 12 valid color-system inputs
- missing_flag_value_gives_helpful_error: 7 flags that require values
- speed_rejects_non_finite_values, speed_rejects_negative_values
- all_boolean_flag_pairs_parse: test all 6 positive boolean forms
- width_height_reject_non_integer: non-numeric inputs
- positional_args_rejected: -- handling
- multiple_independent_flags_combine: complex flag combinations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
